sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: I made an error in the action call syntax. Let me fix it and try clicking on a gray cell in the center piece.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Fix syntax: use dict format for MOUSE action
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 10, 'col': 12}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
